fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).
fields.label: Schema
fields.name: schema_config

fields.description: Local persistence directory for persistent Chroma mode.
fields.label: Persist Directory
fields.name: persist_directory

fields.description: Chroma server host for client mode.
fields.label: Host
fields.name: host

fields.description: Chroma server port for client mode.
fields.label: Port
fields.name: port

fields.description: Whether to use TLS when connecting to a Chroma server.
fields.label: SSL
fields.name: ssl

fields.description: Vector distance function used when creating the Chroma collection.
fields.label: Distance Function
fields.name: distance_function

fields.description: Maps row fields to ChromaDB document/id/metadata
fields.label: Field Mapping
fields.name: field_mapping

fields.description: Behaviour when a document ID already exists
fields.label: On Duplicate
fields.name: on_duplicate
